solution.p: As with the previous example, it will help if 72 can be written as a product of a perfect square. In this case, 4 divides 72\text{,} and 72=4\cdot18\text{.} So
But we arent done. Can 18 can be written as a product of a perfect square? Yes, because 18=9\cdot2\text{.} So
This is as simple as we can make this expression.
